title: Task
description: Task primitive — child of a Plan. Spec §3a (Data types) + spec §10 (tasks table DDL). The renderer's TaskNode + projector's tasks table both consume this shape. Failure escalation: when `failure_count >= max_failures`, the SDK emits `task_escalated` (Stage E routes to HITL).

TaskTitle.title: TaskTitle
TaskTitle.description: Human-readable task title. Non-empty per validation.

TaskStatus.title: TaskStatus
TaskStatus.description: Task FSM state per spec §3a. Transitions enforced by `runtime_main::plan::state_machine::TaskStateMachine`. Recovery sets currently-running tasks to `pending` (NOT `running`) per spec §1b.

hitl.description: Whether this task is a HITL checkpoint.

hitl_reason.description: Reason surfaced in the HITL panel (Stage E).

failure_count.description: Number of failed attempts; resets to 0 on retry success.

max_failures.description: Default 3 per spec §3a. Beyond this, the FSM transitions to `escalated`.

files_affected.description: Glob patterns the task expects to modify. Stage D rails check this.

acceptance_criteria.description: Free-text acceptance criteria. Optional; pure documentation at v0.1.
